gpu_class: RTX 4090 or L40S for smoke; A100/H100 for large reconstructions
purpose: Open-source cryo-EM orchestration and smoke checks for RELION, Warp/M, Topaz, CTFFIND, pyem-style helpers, and local Python tooling.
license_policy: No restricted licenses baked into image.
public_template_note: Public placeholder image. Choose and digest-pin any production image in a private/operator-gated runtime packet.
